rules.rule: When committing a failing test (TDD category), the message must be: [Test Name] -> FAIL.
When committing the passing implementation (TDD category), the message must be: [Test Name] -> PASS.
TDD commits must not use the [CATEGORY]: [Description] format.
Non-TDD commits must use the format: [CATEGORY]: [Description Of Work Completed].
[CATEGORY] must be in CAPS and taken from the approved non-TDD category list.
[Description Of Work Completed] must be in Pascal Case.
Category must not be lowercase or mixed-case.
Description must not be vague — fix, update, changes, wip without specific context are forbidden.
TDD categories requiring FAIL/PASS format: FOUNDATIONS, PROCESSINGS, ORCHESTRATIONS, COORDINATIONS, MANAGEMENTS, AGGREGATIONS, VIEWS, COMPONENTS, PAGES, ACCEPTANCE, INTEGRATION.
Non-TDD categories requiring CATEGORY: Description format: DATA, BROKERS, CONTROLLERS, INFRA, CONFIG, DOCUMENTATION, DESIGN, IMPORT, STATUS, PROVISION, RELEASE.
